pr.title: Non-record: LeakyReLU² + LAWA + Ramping WD + Val Training (val_bpb=1.2302, 1xH100)

output.summary: 10-layer model uses LeakyReLU², LAWA averaging, ramping WD, and lzma compression while training on val set on 1×H100 to fit the 16MB non-record bin.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Trains directly on the validation set per the reported “validation set training” experiment.
techniques: - LeakyReLU² activation plus added layer depth in a tight 16MB budget
- Val-set training combined with LAWA checkpoint averaging
- Ramping weight decay during warmdown with lzma compression
